errors.backendUnreachable: Cannot reach the FilaMind backend — check that the filamind-flow service is running and reachable.

desc.neon: Deep violet with a cyan glow — the signature look

configApply.title: Apply to printer.cfg…
configApply.hint: Writes this block into the chosen file through the safety gate: an existing section is merged param-by-param (its other lines stay), a missing one is added. A backup is taken first; refused while printing or if the file changed on disk.
configApply.ack: I reviewed the block and want to write it
configApply.busy: The printer is busy (or another operation is running) — try again when it is idle.
configApply.stale: The file changed on disk while applying — nothing was written. Try again.
configApply.noop: Everything was already at these values — nothing changed.
configApply.restartHint: Klipper still runs the old values until a firmware restart.
